name: opportunityos
description: OpportunityOS turns high-volume applications, registrations, and browser searches into reusable agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Opportunity workflows for applications and registrations
interface.longDescription: Agent skills for browser search, opportunity tracking, application handoff, and supporting document repair.
defaultPrompt: Use the relevant OpportunityOS workflow for this application or registration task.
Search, shortlist, track, prepare documents, and hand off browser workflows safely.
Prepare this opportunity workflow without crossing human-only submission boundaries.
